title: Add shared Zephyr public identity provider for app compatibility
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-9c4y.14 defines MeshCore-compatible public keys as the LICHEN Ed25519 public key, but Zephyr C currently has link_ctx-local ed25519_pk and no shared app-facing identity provider. What needs to be done: expose a safe no-private-key local-info API for self EUI/IID, self Ed25519 public key, firmware/display identity, and bounded peer public-key enumeration suitable for Meshtastic, MeshCore, Native, and CoAP adapters. Acceptance criteria: app adapters do not reach into arbitrary lichen_link_ctx globals; native_sim tests cover missing identity, self identity, peer lookup, and no private-key exposure; API composes with project-LICHEN-gbx6 shared app-interface contract.
notes: Implementation evidence 2026-07-01: added lichen/subsys/lichen/app_identity as a shared app-facing public identity provider. API exposes copy-only self EUI-64/IID/public key/display/firmware metadata and bounded peer EUI-64/IID/public key enumeration; public header owns app-identity public sizes and forward-declares struct lichen_link_ctx so app adapters do not see private link_ctx fields. Implementation depends on LICHEN_LINK, privately copies only ctx->eui64 and ctx->ed25519_pk from link_ctx, never exports ed25519_sk/link_key, normalizes fixed strings into zeroed snapshots, derives IID by EUI-64 U/L bit flip, and guards self/peer state with a mutex. Added native_sim lichen/tests/app_identity covering missing identity, self identity from link_ctx, direct self string normalization/no stale tail bytes, long-name rejection, peer lookup/update/enumeration/table-full behavior, validation errors, and no private-key byte occurrence in self snapshot. Validation: EC2 i-05e27e074db786e22 clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y4 direct native_sim app_identity PASS 6/6; Twister 'python3 /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/zephyr/scripts/twister -T lichen/tests/app_identity -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-app-identity --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/Users/markatwood/Desktop/Projects/project-LICHEN/lichen' PASS 1/1 scenario, 6 cases, 0 warnings. Reviews: Hooke initially found P1 Kconfig/header dependency and P2 link_ctx snapshot/string issues; fixed by LICHEN_LINK dependency, public header forward declaration, documented caller serialization with link key mutation, and string normalization. Hooke final re-review no P0/P1/P2. Dirac initial P1/P2 matched string/header/Kconfig issues; final re-review no P0/P1/P2. Cicero independent review no P0/P1/P2, closure acceptable; residual below-P2 risks are lack of concurrent mutex ztest and downstream adapter integration pending in blocked dependents. git diff --check PASS.
close_reason: Completed: shared Zephyr app identity provider added with copy-only self/peer public identity API, no private key exposure, native_sim/Twister coverage, and clean reviews.
